question: The chart shows market share by company. Which statement is correct according to the chart data?

options.A: Company A has the largest market share among all companies.
options.B: Company B has the largest market share among all companies.
options.C: Company D has a higher market share than Company B.
options.D: Company C and Company E together hold more than half of the market.

explanation: Labels show Company A has the highest percentage. The pie uses visual_size for slice angles, so Company B's slice can appear larger, misleading viewers.
